CustomField.description: The Insurance Provider (Account) that issued this quote. Each quote on a renewal Opportunity represents one provider's offer.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the insurance company that provided this quote. Only Accounts with the Insurance Provider record type are allowed.
CustomField.label: Insurance Provider

lookupFilter.errorMessage: Selected company must have the record type 'Insurance Provider'. Please choose a valid insurance provider.
lookupFilter.infoMessage: Only companies with the record type "Insurance Provider" are available for selection in this field.
